meta.title: Nitin & Kanak — A Private Love Film
meta.description: A private love film written in light, sound, and memory for Kanak Holkar.

introLines: This is where you live, Kanak.
mind.label: Nitin → Kanak

lines: Every heartbeat has your name.
This heart found its home in you.

hero.name: Kanak
hero.subtitle: A cinematic love letter — scroll to enter our story

poem.title: Words I Could Never Say Out Loud
poem.author: — Nitin
lines: Myyy cutiepie,
Before you, my days were quiet brushstrokes on a grey canvas.
Then September came, and you coloured everything.
You laughed at my clumsy coffee spill,
And I laughed at how quickly you owned my heart.
Our friendship was sunlight through autumn leaves,
Warm, golden, and impossible to hold tight enough.
Then Valentine's Day — my palms sweating,
My voice cracking, my world balancing on your answer.
You said yes. And the sky cracked open into colour.
Since that day, you've become my gravity.
Not the kind that holds me down —
The kind that keeps me from floating away.
I love how you scrunch your nose when you think.
I love how your laughter fills every room.
I love how you make ordinary moments feel sacred.
Kanak, you are not just my girlfriend.
You are my compass, my comfort, my calm.
You are my favourite chapter in every story.
You are the reason I believe in forever.
This website is my heart, turned inside out.
Every pixel, every particle, every glow — that's how you make me feel.
I will wait two months. I will wait two lifetimes.
Because you, Kanak Holkar, are worth every second.
With all my love, always —
Nitin

milestones.title: The Beginning
milestones.content: Remember when college started back in September 2023? That's when we talked for the first time. We were just two strangers becoming friends, but looking back, it really felt like our paths were meant to cross. I still remember what we said to each other, and that's how a very different, special friendship started that would change my world forever.

milestones.title: Friendship on Fire
milestones.content: Remember throughout 2024-2025 when we faced so many ups and downs? We fought a lot and had our moments, but no matter what happened, we were like a thread—always connected, always pulling back to each other. You stood by me through it all, and you made me realize how beautiful it feels to be truly cared for.

milestones.title: The Day Everything Changed
milestones.content: On February 15, 2026, everything changed. I remember going completely blank and speechless for the first time in my life. Something absolutely magical happened that I never expected, and I got you—the best person in my life, actually my whole life. I still cherish and remember every single second of that beautiful day.

milestones.title: Why You're My Everything
milestones.content: Ever since that day, I've cherished every single moment of us. You unlocked so many feelings and emotions that were buried deep inside me. For the first time, I did things for someone that I never thought I would—and I want to keep loving you like this for the rest of my life. There are so many beautiful chapters waiting for us.

gallery.title: The Gallery of Us
gallery.subtitle: Click a memory to step inside — each one is a world.

items.caption: Where our story began
items.story: The day we became ours. A single forced sip of my Iced Americano, your reaction to it, and the beautiful beginning of us.

items.caption: Blossoming together
items.story: Just sitting together, cherishing every moment of us. Every single day being with you is everything I could ever ask for.

items.caption: Our quiet morning after
items.story: Taking this picture of you on our way back, sleepy-eyed and smiling. The morning after the night the world stood still, wishing the road would go on forever.

items.caption: Forever together
items.story: All roads in my mind lead to one place — your heart, Kanak.

buildupLines: From September 2023 to this very second...
You have been my colour, my joy, my meaning.
Every particle of light on this screen is how you make me feel.
And now, there is only one question left...
proposal.question: Kanak Holkar, will you be with me for your whole life?
proposal.celebrationText: Thank you for choosing this life with me, Kanak. I will keep choosing you in every ordinary, difficult, beautiful day ahead.
proposal.declineTitle: Take all the time you need.
proposal.declineText: This question is an invitation, never a demand. Your honesty matters to me, and so does your pace.

mirror.title: Envenomed
mirror.subtitle: Words you wrote four years ago, held beside the woman you chose to become.

lines.text: Barging into my nerves and choking up to my neck,
My soul leaving marks on my face, drying as I stay awake;
I was in my lows — for her they had bottomed,
My eyes trailed down her soul as she called me envenomed.
My spirit settled down but she never settled for less,
I pretended to be cold and tiny; she was a hot mess;
I was smiling through the pain but she showed no emotions,
My eyes trailed down her soul as she called me envenomed.
She was a portrait of me, I was a reflection she embedded,
She said 'baby portraits are eternal, reflections are faded';
Realize! I am what all you ever ambitioned,
My eyes trailed down her soul as she called me envenomed.
She was not like me, she gained what I aspired,
I cursed the dark under my lights, herself she admired;
She lifted my chin so gentle, almost soothing my thunder,
My eyes trailed down her soul as she called me envenomed.
As she saw the sun rise, I felt her disappearing out of way,
Sheer pain in my heart, with every hitting ray;
Finally comprehending she wasn't just a reflection but it was me,
This mind created a mirage to redefine my divinity;
I was merrier being her, this skin I put on was itchy;
As I snapped back to reality standing still yet shaken,
With a blow I hit the ground… turned around to reckon;
My body leaving the phantom, with it followed the venom.
You wrote about choking on doubts, feeling so tiny in your own skin,
fighting a phantom in the mirror, wondering where to begin.
You called yourself envenomed, hiding the storm inside your heart,
but Kanak, to me, you were perfect and beautiful right from the start.
You pretended to be cold, smiling through the quiet pain,
thinking you had to be flawless, like sunlight after the rain.
But I don't know what I would ever be in this world without you—
you are the cutest, most lovable soul, and every word of this is true.
You wrote that portraits are eternal and reflections fade away,
but you are the one who fills my sky with color every single day.
You're the prettiest person in this universe, my guiding light,
making even the darkest, coldest nights feel warm and bright.
You cursed the dark under your lights, trying to soothe your thunder,
while I stood by, looking at you with nothing but awe and wonder.
You didn't need to aspire to be anyone else in that mirror's reflection,
because in my eyes, you have always been the definition of perfection.
So let the phantom fade away, and let the venom finally depart,
you don't need a mirage to see the magic in your own heart.
Just look at the way I look at you, my absolute favorite view—
because in my eyes, you were never the venom. You were always the cure.
— Nitin

bot.name: Nitin's Heart
bot.greeting: Hello, Kanak. Think of me as a quiet guide through the memories Nitin placed here. I know the chapters, and I am here whenever you want to pause.

personality.speakingStyle: intimate, tender, natural — like a warm whisper
